The Indigo Disk Pokédex

The expansion pass to Pokémon Scarlet & Violet, The Hidden Treasure of Area Zero, adds several new Pokémon as well as old favourites. They may be transferred in from Pokémon Home without buying the DLC, however the pass is required to catch them in-game, and of course to play the new storyline.

The Indigo Disk is the second part, released in December 2023. It takes place at the Blueberry Academy, located on an island near the Unova region. It consists of a Terarium with four distinct biomes.

All the Pokémon in the regional Blueberry Pokédex are listed below.

See the Kitakami Pokédex for the first part of the DLC (The Teal Mask), or the Scarlet/Violet Pokédex for the base game.

Doduo
Normal · Flying
